Why Keenbuilt

Builders who show up, quote straight, and finish what they start.

Most people don't leave a bad review — they just quietly avoid using that builder again. Here's what our clients actually notice.

Local

Based Here, Not Just Working Here

We live and build across the North Shore, so callbacks, warranty work and site visits are never a two-hour round trip.

Direct

One Number, One Boss

You speak to Harry from the first measure-up to the final walkthrough — no account managers, no chasing a stranger for answers.

Transparent

Fixed-Price, Itemised Quotes

You get a written quote before a single tool comes out of the van. The number you're quoted is the number you pay.

Thorough

Finished Like It's Our Own House

From structural carpentry to the last cabinet handle, the site is left clean and the details are the ones a builder would want for themselves.

What We Build

All things building & carpentry, under one roof.

Whether it's a full new build or one stubborn door that won't close properly, it's the same crew and the same standard.

01 — Ground Up

New Builds

From council-approved plans to keys in hand — structural framing, carpentry and finishing managed start to finish.

02 — Extend

Renovations & Additions

Second storeys, extra bedrooms and full home renovations, built to blend with the house you've already got.

03 — Outdoors

Decking & Outdoor Living

Timber and composite decks, alfresco areas and privacy screening, built for the way you actually use your backyard.

04 — Wet Areas

Bathroom Renovations

Waterproofing, tiling, fixtures and cabinetry handled by one crew — no gaps between trades, no gaps in the shower screen.

05 — Heart of Home

Kitchen Renovations

Full kitchen strip-outs and rebuilds, from cabinetry carpentry through to the final splashback.

06 — Weatherproof

Roofing

Re-roofs, repairs and roof carpentry that keep the rest of the renovation dry while it's being built.

Service Areas

Working across Sydney's Upper North Shore.

Based near Lindfield and building throughout the surrounding suburbs — close enough that quotes, site visits and warranty callbacks are never a hassle.
